title: NUK First Choice+ Baby Bottles | 0-6 Months | 300 ml | Anti-Colic Bottles with Orthodontic Silicone Teat | Temperature Control | BPA-Free | Grey & White | 3 Count
features: Orthodontic shaped teat with a distinct soft zone moulds gently to baby's palate, providing plenty of room for tongue and jaw movement; 99% of babies accept this teat*
Suitable for combination feeding, with an extra wide lip support that simulates breast feeding as closely as possible
Built-in Temperature Control indicator shows when milk is too hot
Innovative Anti-Colic vent helps prevent the harmful swallowing of air
Wide bottle neck allows for easy filling and cleaning; sealing disc and protective cap helps prevent leakage
description: Product Description NUK First Choice+ baby bottles have an orthodontic shaped teat and super soft zone which simulates the shape of a mother's nipple during breastfeeding. This makes it easier for baby to accept and for mum to alternate between breast and bottle-feeding. The natural shape of the NUK teat also perfectly adapts to baby's sensitive palate and helps exercise their jaw and teeth, while the NUK Anti-Colic Air System minimises infant colic caused by the harmful swallowing of air. The built-in Temperature Control indicator changes colour from blue to white when the bottle's contents are too hot, so you can be sure your baby's milk is always at a comfortable drinking temperature. Each bottle is BPA-free and durable, while the protective cap and included sealing disc ensure leak-proof transportation. *Independent market research among 205 mothers, Germany 2018 Box Contains 3 x bottle
